trivia: The longest Dreamliner trades range for capacity, doing dense medium-long-haul work, especially across Asia. Singapore Airlines launched it and remains its emblematic operator.
Its whole extra stretch is cabin: same wing, same tanks, so it stays regional-long-haul by Dreamliner standards.
